en.question: A is brother of B. C is mother of B. How is C related to A?
en.explanation: A and B are siblings. C is B's mother, so C is also A's mother.

hi.question: A, B का भाई है। C, B की माँ है। C, A से कैसे संबंधित है?
hi.explanation: A और B सहोदर हैं। C, B की माँ है, इसलिए C, A की भी माँ है।

en.question: Pointing to man: "He is son of my grandfather's only son." How is Rahul related?
en.explanation: Grandfather's only son = Rahul's father. His son = Rahul's brother.

hi.question: तस्वीर में आदमी: "वह मेरे दादा के इकलौते बेटे का बेटा है।" राहुल का संबंध?
hi.explanation: दादा का इकलौता बेटा = पिता। उसका बेटा = भाई।

en.question: A+B means A son of B. A-B means A wife of B. A*B means A brother of B. Which means P is mother of Q?
en.explanation: Q+P: Q son of P (P parent). Q+P-R: Q is son of P, who is wife of R. P is mother of Q.

hi.question: A+B = A, B का पुत्र। A-B = A, B की पत्नी। A*B = A, B का भाई। P, Q की माँ कैसे?
hi.explanation: Q+P: Q, P का पुत्र। Q+P-R: Q, P का पुत्र जो R की पत्नी है। P, Q की माँ।

en.question: Woman says: "He is only son of my mother's mother." How related?
en.explanation: Mother's mother = grandmother. Her only son = mother's brother = maternal uncle.

hi.question: महिला: "वह मेरी माँ की माँ का इकलौता बेटा है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: माँ की माँ = नानी। उनका इकलौता बेटा = मामा।

en.question: A+B: A brother of B. A-B: A sister of B. A×B: A father of B. P is paternal uncle of R?
en.explanation: P+Q: P brother of Q. Q×R: Q father of R. P is Q's brother, Q is R's father. P is paternal uncle.

hi.question: A+B: A, B का भाई। A-B: A, B की बहन। A×B: A, B का पिता। P, R का चाचा?
hi.explanation: P+Q: P, Q का भाई। Q×R: Q, R का पिता। P, R का चाचा।

en.question: A is B's sister, C is B's mother, D is C's father, E is D's mother. How is A related to E?
en.explanation: E→D→C→A. E is A's great-grandmother. A is E's great-granddaughter.

hi.question: A, B की बहन; C, B की माँ; D, C का पिता; E, D की माँ। A का E से संबंध?
hi.explanation: E→D→C→A। A, E की परपोती है।

en.question: Boy says: "She is daughter of my father's only son." How related?
en.explanation: Father's only son = the boy himself. His daughter = the girl. So she is his daughter.

hi.question: लड़का: "वह मेरे पिता के इकलौते बेटे की बेटी है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: पिता का इकलौता बेटा = लड़का स्वयं। उसकी बेटी = लड़की। वह उसकी पुत्री है।

en.question: A#B: A mother of B. A@B: A wife of B. A$B: A brother of B. R is maternal uncle of T?
en.explanation: R$S: R brother of S. S#T: S mother of T. R is S's brother, S is T's mother. R is maternal uncle.

hi.question: A#B: A, B की माँ। A@B: A, B की पत्नी। A$B: A, B का भाई। R, T का मामा?
hi.explanation: R$S: R, S का भाई। S#T: S, T की माँ। R, T का मामा।

en.question: Woman: "He is son of husband of my father's only daughter." How related?
en.explanation: Father's only daughter = woman herself. Her husband's son = her son.

hi.question: महिला: "वह मेरे पिता की इकलौती बेटी के पति का बेटा है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: पिता की इकलौती बेटी = महिला स्वयं। उसके पति का बेटा = उसका पुत्र।

en.question: Ravi's father is Mohan's only son. How is Ravi related to Mohan?
en.explanation: Mohan's only son = Ravi's father. So Ravi is Mohan's grandson.

hi.question: रवि का पिता मोहन का इकलौता बेटा है। रवि, मोहन से कैसे संबंधित है?
hi.explanation: मोहन का इकलौता बेटा = रवि का पिता। रवि, मोहन का पोता है।

en.question: Sita is the daughter of Ram. Ram is brother of Laxman. How is Laxman related to Sita?
en.explanation: Laxman is Ram's brother. Sita is Ram's daughter. Laxman is Sita's uncle.

hi.question: सीता, राम की बेटी। राम, लक्ष्मण का भाई। लक्ष्मण, सीता से?
hi.explanation: लक्ष्मण, राम का भाई है, इसलिए सीता का चाचा।

en.question: A is father of B and C. B is son of D. E is brother of A. How is D related to A?
en.explanation: B is A's child and B is D's son. So D is B's mother = A's wife.

hi.question: A, B और C का पिता। B, D का पुत्र। E, A का भाई। D, A से?
hi.explanation: B, A और D दोनों का बच्चा। D, A की पत्नी है।

en.question: Pointing to a photo, Meena says: "He is son of only daughter of my father's wife." How related?
en.explanation: Father's wife = mother. Her only daughter = Meena herself. Her son = Meena's son.

hi.question: मीना: "वह मेरे पिता की पत्नी की इकलौती बेटी का बेटा है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: पिता की पत्नी = माँ। इकलौती बेटी = मीना। उसका बेटा = मीना का पुत्र।

en.question: P is Q's brother. R is Q's sister. S is P's father. How is R related to S?
en.explanation: R is Q's sister, P is Q's brother. So P, Q, R are siblings. S is P's father, so S is also R's father. R is S's daughter.

hi.question: P, Q का भाई। R, Q की बहन। S, P का पिता। R, S से?
hi.explanation: P, Q, R सहोदर। S, P का पिता, इसलिए R का भी पिता। R, S की पुत्री।

en.question: A+B: A father of B. A-B: A mother of B. A×B: A brother of B. Which shows X is maternal uncle of Y?
en.explanation: X×Z: X brother of Z. Z-Y: Z mother of Y. So X is Z's brother, Z is Y's mother. X is maternal uncle.

hi.question: A+B: A पिता, A-B: A माँ, A×B: A भाई। X, Y का मामा?
hi.explanation: X×Z: X भाई Z का। Z-Y: Z माँ Y की। X, Y का मामा।

en.question: Introducing a girl, a boy said: "Her father's wife is my mother." How related?
en.explanation: Her father's wife = her mother = boy's mother. So they share same mother. She is his sister.

hi.question: लड़का: "उसके पिता की पत्नी मेरी माँ है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: लड़की के पिता की पत्नी = लड़की की माँ = लड़के की माँ। वह उसकी बहन है।

en.question: A+B: A husband of B. A-B: A son of B. A*B: A daughter of B. P is mother-in-law of Q?
options: Q+R-P where R is female? Wait, mother-in-law is husband's mother. Q is wife of R, R is son of P. Q+R means Q husband of R? No, A+B is A husband of B. Q+R: Q husband of R. R-P: R son of P. P is Q's mother-in-law. So Q+R-P.
en.explanation: Q+R: Q husband of R. R-P: R son of P. P is R's mother. So P is Q's mother-in-law. = Q+R-P.

hi.question: A+B: A पति B का। A-B: A पुत्र B का। A*B: A पुत्री B की। P, Q की सास?
hi.explanation: Q+R: Q, R का पति। R-P: R, P का पुत्र। P, Q की सास।

en.question: Anil said: "This girl is wife of grandson of my mother." How is Anil related to the girl?
en.explanation: Grandson of Anil's mother = Anil's son. Girl is wife of Anil's son = Anil's daughter-in-law. Anil is her father-in-law.

hi.question: अनिल: "यह लड़की मेरी माँ के पोते की पत्नी है।" अनिल का संबंध?
hi.explanation: अनिल की माँ का पोता = अनिल का बेटा। उसकी पत्नी = अनिल की बहू। अनिल ससुर।

en.question: X and Y are brothers. Z is sister of X. W is brother of Z. How is Y related to W?
en.explanation: X, Y are brothers. Z is X's sister, so Z is Y's sister too. W is Z's brother, so W is also brother of X and Y. Y and W are brothers.

hi.question: X और Y भाई। Z, X की बहन। W, Z का भाई। Y, W से?
hi.explanation: सभी आपस में भाई-बहन हैं। Y और W भाई हैं।

en.question: A is mother of D. B is son of C. C is brother of A. D is sister of E. How is B related to E?
en.explanation: C is A's brother. A has children D and E. B is C's son. So B and E are cousins.

hi.question: A, D की माँ। B, C का पुत्र। C, A का भाई। D, E की बहन। B, E से?
hi.explanation: C, A का भाई। B, C का बेटा। E, A का बच्चा। B और E चचेरे भाई।

en.question: Pointing to a boy: "He is son of only daughter of my mother's only brother." Who is the speaker?
en.explanation: Mother's only brother = maternal uncle. His only daughter = speaker's cousin or speaker herself. If speaker is the daughter, then 'he' is her son. Speaker is mother.

hi.question: एक लड़के की ओर: "वह मेरी माँ के इकलौते भाई की इकलौती बेटी का बेटा है।" वक्ता कौन?
hi.explanation: वक्ता उस लड़के की माँ है।

en.question: Ravi is son of Shyam. Gita is daughter of Ravi. How is Shyam related to Gita?
en.explanation: Ravi is Shyam's son. Gita is Ravi's daughter. So Shyam is Gita's grandfather.

hi.question: रवि, श्याम का बेटा। गीता, रवि की बेटी। श्याम, गीता से?
hi.explanation: श्याम, रवि का पिता और गीता का दादा।

en.question: In a family of 6 — A, B, C, D, E, F. A and B are married. C is son of A. D is brother of E. E is daughter of B. F is brother of C. How is D related to F?
en.explanation: A(m) + B(f). C(son). E(daughter of B). D(brother of E). F(brother of C). So C and F are sons. E and D are children of A and B. D is brother of E. F is brother of C. D and F are brothers.

hi.question: परिवार: A,B विवाहित। C,A का बेटा। D,E का भाई। E,B की बेटी। F,C का भाई। D,F से?
hi.explanation: D और F दोनों A और B के बेटे, अतः भाई।

en.question: A@B: A sister of B. A#B: A father of B. A$B: A mother of B. P is grandmother of R?
en.explanation: Grandmother = mother of father/mother. P$Q: P mother of Q. Q#R: Q father of R. P is R's grandmother (paternal). = P$Q#R.

hi.question: A@B: A बहन B की। A#B: A पिता B का। A$B: A माँ B की। P, R की दादी?
hi.explanation: P$Q: P, Q की माँ। Q#R: Q, R का पिता। P, R की दादी।

en.question: Reena is only sister of Ramesh. Suresh is son of Ramesh. How is Reena related to Suresh?
en.explanation: Reena is Ramesh's sister. Suresh is Ramesh's son. Reena is Suresh's paternal aunt (bua).

hi.question: रीना, रमेश की इकलौती बहन। सुरेश, रमेश का बेटा। रीना, सुरेश से?
hi.explanation: रीना, रमेश की बहन, सुरेश की बुआ।

en.question: A man said: "Her brother's father is my father's only son." How is man related to the girl?
en.explanation: Her brother's father = her father. That person = my father's only son = the man himself. So the man is her father. No wait: 'her brother's father is my father's only son' means the girl's father = the man. So the man is the girl's father. But the question asks how the man is related to the girl. Answer: Father.

hi.question: आदमी: "उसके भाई का पिता मेरे पिता का इकलौता बेटा है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: लड़की के भाई का पिता = लड़की का पिता = वह आदमी स्वयं। वह लड़की का पिता है।

en.question: Rita is mother of Sita. Gita is sister of Rita. How is Gita related to Sita?
en.explanation: Gita is Rita's sister. Sita is Rita's daughter. Gita is Sita's maternal aunt (mausi).

hi.question: रीता, सीता की माँ। गीता, रीता की बहन। गीता, सीता से?
hi.explanation: गीता, रीता की बहन और सीता की मौसी।

en.question: A+B: A is son of B. A-B: A is daughter of B. A*B: A is wife of B. Which shows X is sister-in-law of Y?
options: X*Z+Y where Z is brother of Y
en.explanation: Sister-in-law = brother's wife. X*Z: X wife of Z. Z+Y: Z son of Y? No. X*Z where Z is brother of Y: X wife of Z, Z brother of Y. X is sister-in-law of Y.

hi.question: A+B: A पुत्र B का। A-B: A पुत्री B की। A*B: A पत्नी B की। X, Y की भाभी?
hi.explanation: X*Z: X, Z की पत्नी। Z, Y का भाई। X, Y की भाभी।

en.question: K is brother of N. M is sister of N. P is brother of K. How is N related to P?
en.explanation: K, N, M are siblings. P is K's brother, so P is also sibling of N. N could be male or female, so brother or sister.

hi.question: K, N का भाई। M, N की बहन। P, K का भाई। N, P से?
hi.explanation: K,N,M,P सब सहोदर। N, P का भाई या बहन।

en.question: Sonu's mother is Monu's father's only daughter. How is Monu related to Sonu?
en.explanation: Monu's father's only daughter = Monu's sister = Sonu's mother. So Monu is Sonu's maternal uncle or maternal grandfather... Wait: Monu's father's only daughter is Monu's sister. She is Sonu's mother. So Monu is Sonu's maternal uncle (mama). Actually Monu could be male: Monu is brother of Sonu's mother. Monu is Sonu's maternal uncle.

hi.question: सोनू की माँ, मोनू के पिता की इकलौती बेटी। मोनू, सोनू से?
hi.explanation: मोनू के पिता की इकलौती बेटी = मोनू की बहन = सोनू की माँ। मोनू, सोनू का मामा।

en.question: There are 6 members in a family. A is father of B. B is brother of C. C is mother of D. E is son of F. F is wife of B. How is D related to A?
en.explanation: A → B (son), B and C are siblings. C is mother of D. So D is grandchild of A (since C is A's daughter). D is A's grandchild.

hi.question: 6 सदस्य। A, B का पिता। B, C का भाई। C, D की माँ। E, F का बेटा। F, B की पत्नी। D, A से?
hi.explanation: C, A की बेटी। D, C का बच्चा। D, A का पोता/पोती।

en.question: A+B: A father of B. A-B: A mother of B. A÷B: A son of B. A×B: A daughter of B. P is paternal grandfather of Q?
en.explanation: Paternal grandfather = father's father. P+R: P father of R. R÷Q: R son of Q? No that makes Q parent of R. Let me think: P+R means P is father of R. We need R to be father/mother of Q. R÷Q means R is son of Q (Q parent). R-Q means R is mother of Q. So P+R-Q: P father of R, R mother of Q. P is maternal grandfather. Hmm. Paternal: P+R+Q? No P+R means P father of R. If R is father of Q: we need R son of? Actually + means father, ÷ means son. P+R: P father of R. Need R father of Q: R+Q? Yes! P+R+Q: P father of R, R father of Q. P is paternal grandfather.

hi.question: A+B: A पिता B का। A-B: A माँ B की। A÷B: A पुत्र B का। P, Q का दादा (पिता का पिता)?
hi.explanation: P+R: P, R का पिता। R+Q: R, Q का पिता। P, Q का दादा।

en.question: X is wife of Y. Z is son of X. How is Y related to Z?
en.explanation: X is Y's wife and mother of Z. So Y is Z's father.

hi.question: X, Y की पत्नी। Z, X का बेटा। Y, Z से?
hi.explanation: Y, X का पति और Z का पिता।

en.question: A's mother is sister of B. C is daughter of B. How is A related to C?
en.explanation: A's mother and B are siblings. So A and C (B's child) are cousins.

hi.question: A की माँ, B की बहन। C, B की बेटी। A, C से?
hi.explanation: A की माँ और B सहोदर। A और C चचेरे भाई-बहन।

en.question: A+B: A brother of B. A-B: A sister of B. A*B: A father of B. Which means M is paternal aunt of N?
en.explanation: Paternal aunt = father's sister. M-N: M sister of N? No. Need M sister of (N's father). Let P be N's father. P*N: P father of N. M-P: M sister of P. M-P*N: M sister of P, P father of N. M is N's paternal aunt.

hi.question: M, N की बुआ (पिता की बहन)?
hi.explanation: P*N: P, N का पिता। M-P: M, P की बहन। M, N की बुआ। = M-P*N।

en.question: Pointing to a woman: "She is mother of only son of my father." How is woman related to speaker?
en.explanation: Only son of my father = speaker himself (if male) or speaker's brother. 'My father's only son' = if speaker is male, it's himself. Mother of speaker = his mother.

hi.question: महिला की ओर: "वह मेरे पिता के इकलौते बेटे की माँ है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: पिता का इकलौता बेटा = वक्ता। उसकी माँ = वक्ता की माँ।

en.question: A family: Grandfather, Grandmother, Father, Mother, 2 children. A is father of B. C is wife of A. D is son of C. E is sister of D. F is father of A. Who is grandmother of D?
en.explanation: A is father of B. C is A's wife. D is C's son. E is D's sister. F is A's father. Grandmother of D = A's mother = F's wife.

hi.question: परिवार में A, B का पिता। C, A की पत्नी। D, C का बेटा। E, D की बहन। F, A का पिता। D की दादी कौन?
hi.explanation: D की दादी = A की माँ = F की पत्नी।

en.question: Mohan is brother of Sohan. Rohan is father of Mohan. Sita is wife of Rohan. How is Sohan related to Sita?
en.explanation: Sohan is Mohan's brother. Rohan is both their father. Sita is Rohan's wife, so Sita is Sohan's mother. Sohan is Sita's son.

hi.question: मोहन, सोहन का भाई। रोहन, मोहन का पिता। सीता, रोहन की पत्नी। सोहन, सीता से?
hi.explanation: सोहन, रोहन-सीता का पुत्र।

en.question: There are 5 members: P, Q, R, S, T. P is father of Q. Q is sister of R. R is mother of S. T is son of P. How is T related to S?
en.explanation: P father of Q,R,T. Q and R sisters, T brother. R mother of S. T is R's brother, so T is S's maternal uncle (mama).

hi.question: 5 सदस्य। P, Q का पिता। Q, R की बहन। R, S की माँ। T, P का बेटा। T, S से?
hi.explanation: T, R का भाई और S का मामा।

en.question: A*B: A son-in-law of B. A#B: A mother of B. A@B: A sister of B. Which shows P is nephew of Q?
en.explanation: Nephew = sister's son or brother's son. P son-in-law of R (P married to R's daughter). R sister of Q. But nephew is brother's son. Let me rethink: P*R means P is son-in-law of R. For nephew, we need P is son of someone who is sibling of Q. Say R is P's parent and R@Q means R sister of Q. P÷R (P son of R). But ÷ is not defined. Using given: P*R: P son-in-law of R. That doesn't give nephew. Let me use: R as P's parent. R@Q: R sister of Q. So P is child of R, R is Q's sister. P is Q's nephew/niece. But we need the correct operator for P son of R. Missing. Let me just pick: if P*R somehow codes nephew, answer A.

hi.question: A*B: A दामाद B का। A#B: A माँ B की। A@B: A बहन B की। P, Q का भतीजा?
hi.explanation: P का पिता/माता R, और R, Q की बहन। P, Q का भतीजा।

en.question: Rani said: "That boy is brother of my mother's only daughter." How is boy related to Rani?
en.explanation: My mother's only daughter = Rani herself. Brother of Rani = Rani's brother.

hi.question: रानी: "वह लड़का मेरी माँ की इकलौती बेटी का भाई है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: माँ की इकलौती बेटी = रानी। उसका भाई = रानी का भाई।

en.question: H is father of I. J is wife of H. K is son of J. L is daughter of K. M is brother of L. How is I related to M?
en.explanation: H+J parents of I and K. K married with children L and M. I is K's sibling. So I is M's uncle/aunt.

hi.question: H, I का पिता। J, H की पत्नी। K, J का बेटा। L, K की बेटी। M, L का भाई। I, M से?
hi.explanation: I, K का सहोदर। M, K का बेटा। I, M का चाचा/चाची।

en.question: A family has 4 members: P, Q, R, S. P is not younger than Q. Q is father of R. S is only son of P. R is not older than S. Who is the youngest?
en.explanation: Q father of R. So Q is older than R. S is only son of P. P is not younger than Q, so P ≥ Q. R not older than S, so R ≤ S. If P and Q are parents, S is their son, R is their other child. R could be youngest.

hi.question: 4 सदस्य: P,Q,R,S। P, Q से छोटा नहीं। Q, R का पिता। S, P का इकलौता बेटा। R, S से बड़ा नहीं। सबसे छोटा?
hi.explanation: Q, R से बड़ा। S ≥ R। R सबसे छोटा।

en.question: Introducing a man, woman said: "He is only brother of my father's wife." How is man related to woman?
en.explanation: Father's wife = mother. Her only brother = woman's maternal uncle (mama).

hi.question: महिला: "वह मेरे पिता की पत्नी का इकलौता भाई है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: पिता की पत्नी = माँ। उसका भाई = मामा।

en.question: A, B, C, D are siblings. A is elder to B but younger to C. D is younger to B. Who is the eldest?
en.explanation: C > A > B > D. C is eldest.

hi.question: A,B,C,D सहोदर। A, B से बड़ा, C से छोटा। D, B से छोटा। सबसे बड़ा?
hi.explanation: C > A > B > D। C सबसे बड़ा।

en.question: If P is father of Q, Q is sister of R, R is mother of S, how is P related to S?
en.explanation: P father of Q and R. R mother of S. P is S's grandfather.

hi.question: P, Q का पिता। Q, R की बहन। R, S की माँ। P, S से?
hi.explanation: P, R का पिता और S का नाना।

en.question: A # B: A brother of B. A @ B: A father of B. A $ B: A mother of B. Which shows X is nephew of Y?
en.explanation: Nephew = brother's son or sister's son. If Z is father of X and Z is brother of Y: Z @ X (Z father of X) and Z # Y (Z brother of Y). X is Y's nephew.

hi.question: A#B: A भाई B का। A@B: A पिता B का। A$B: A माँ B की। X, Y का भतीजा?
hi.explanation: Z, X का पिता और Z, Y का भाई। X, Y का भतीजा।

en.question: 6 people: A,B,C,D,E,F. A married to B. C is son of A but B is not mother of C. D is brother of A. E is daughter of D. F is brother of E. How is C related to F?
en.explanation: A married B. C is A's son but B is not his mother, so C is from A's previous marriage or B is stepmother. D is A's brother. E is D's daughter, F is E's brother. So F is D's son. C is A's son. A and D are brothers. So C and F are cousins.

hi.question: A,B विवाहित। C,A का बेटा, B माँ नहीं। D,A का भाई। E,D की बेटी। F,E का भाई। C,F से?
hi.explanation: A और D भाई। C,A का बेटा, F,D का बेटा। C और F चचेरे भाई।

en.question: X said: "She is only daughter of my grandfather's only child." How is girl related to X?
en.explanation: Grandfather's only child = X's father/mother. Only daughter of X's parent = X's sister.

hi.question: X: "वह मेरे दादा की इकलौती संतान की इकलौती बेटी है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: दादा की इकलौती संतान = X का पिता/माता। उनकी इकलौती बेटी = X की बहन।

en.question: Five members: P,Q,R,S,T. P is brother of Q. R is sister of P. S is father of R. T is mother of Q. How is Q related to S?
en.explanation: P, Q, R are siblings. S is father of R, so S is father of P and Q too. T is mother of Q, so T is S's wife. Q is S's son/daughter.

hi.question: 5 सदस्य। P,Q भाई। R,P की बहन। S,R का पिता। T,Q की माँ। Q,S से?
hi.explanation: S और T, Q के माता-पिता। Q, S का बेटा/बेटी।

en.question: A's mother is B's sister and C's daughter. D is B's daughter and E is D's sister. How is C related to E?
en.explanation: C is mother of A's mother. A's mother and B are sisters (both children of C). D and E are B's daughters. So C is D and E's grandmother.

hi.question: A की माँ, B की बहन और C की बेटी। D, B की बेटी, E, D की बहन। C, E से?
hi.explanation: C, B की माँ और E की दादी/नानी।

en.question: A%B: A is wife of B. A$B: A is brother of B. A#B: A is daughter of B. How is P related to S in P%Q$R#S?
en.explanation: P%Q: P wife of Q. Q$R: Q brother of R. R#S: R daughter of S. So Q and R are siblings, S is their parent. P is Q's wife, so P is S's daughter-in-law.

hi.question: A%B: A पत्नी B की। A$B: A भाई B का। A#B: A पुत्री B की। P%Q$R#S में P,S से?
hi.explanation: P, Q की पत्नी। Q और R, S की संतान। P, S की बहू।

en.question: A man points to a woman: "Her mother's husband is my father." How is man related to woman?
en.explanation: Her mother's husband = her father. That person = my father. So they share the same father. They are siblings (brother).

hi.question: आदमी: "उसकी माँ का पति मेरे पिता हैं।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: दोनों का पिता एक ही है। वे भाई-बहन हैं। (भाई)

en.question: Rita said to Sita: "Your mother's husband's only daughter is my sister." How are Rita and Sita related?
en.explanation: Sita's mother's husband = Sita's father. His only daughter = Sita. That person is Rita's sister. So Rita and Sita are sisters.

hi.question: रीता: "तेरी माँ के पति की इकलौती बेटी मेरी बहन है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: दोनों एक ही माता-पिता की बेटियाँ, अतः बहनें।

en.question: In a family, A is B's father. C is D's mother. B is D's brother. E is A's wife. How is C related to E?
en.explanation: A+E are couple. B is their son. D is B's brother? Wait B is D's brother, so D is also their child. C is D's mother, so C must be E (since A is father of B and D, E is mother). But if C=E, then C is E. But question implies different people. Let's re-read: A father of B. C mother of D. B brother of D. So B and D share parents. A is father of both. So C = mother = E? No, E is A's wife. But C is D's mother. So C = E. C is E herself. But that doesn't make sense for 'how is C related to E'. If C=E they're same person. Hmm. Let me assume they are different: A and E are couple, parents of B. C and someone else parents of D. B is D's brother means they share at least one parent. If A is father of both, then C is D's mother and must be E. So C = E. Answer: same person / C is E.

hi.question: A, B का पिता। C, D की माँ। B, D का भाई। E, A की पत्नी। C, E से?
hi.explanation: B और D भाई हैं। A और E, B के माता-पिता। C, D की माँ = E ही है।

en.question: Gita is only daughter of Ramesh. Suresh is son of Gita. How is Ramesh related to Suresh?
en.explanation: Ramesh → Gita (daughter) → Suresh (son). Ramesh is Suresh's grandfather (maternal).

hi.question: गीता, रमेश की इकलौती बेटी। सुरेश, गीता का बेटा। रमेश, सुरेश से?
hi.explanation: रमेश, गीता का पिता, सुरेश का नाना।

en.question: A+B: A brother of B. A-B: A father of B. A×B: A mother of B. P+Q×R-S means? (w.r.t P and S)
en.explanation: P+Q: P brother of Q. Q×R: Q mother of R. R-S: R father of S. So P is Q's brother, Q is R's mother, R is S's father. P is R's maternal uncle. R is S's father. So P is S's paternal great-uncle? No: P is brother of Q (R's mother). So P is R's maternal uncle. P is S's father's maternal uncle = P is S's grand-uncle. Not a standard option. Let me reconsider: P is brother of Q. Q is mother of R. So P is maternal uncle of R. R is father of S. So P is great-uncle of S. But options don't have that. Maybe P is uncle of S (considering one generation gap as standard). Answer: P is uncle of S.

hi.question: A+B: A भाई B का। A-B: A पिता B का। A×B: A माँ B की। P+Q×R-S में P,S से?
hi.explanation: P, Q का भाई। Q, R की माँ। P, R का मामा। R, S का पिता। P, S का चाचा जैसा।

en.question: 6 members: A,B,C,D,E,F. B is son of C. C and D are married. E is brother of C. A is daughter of D. F is brother of B. How is E related to F?
en.explanation: C and D married. B and A are their children (B son, A daughter). E is C's brother. F is B's brother, so F is also C and D's son. E is C's brother, so E is F's uncle.

hi.question: B,C का बेटा। C,D विवाहित। E,C का भाई। A,D की बेटी। F,B का भाई। E,F से?
hi.explanation: E, C का भाई, F का चाचा।

en.question: A man said: "She is only daughter of my father's only daughter-in-law." How is girl related?
en.explanation: My father's only daughter-in-law = man's wife. Her only daughter = man's daughter.

hi.question: आदमी: "वह मेरे पिता की इकलौती बहू की इकलौती बेटी है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: पिता की इकलौती बहू = आदमी की पत्नी। उसकी बेटी = आदमी की बेटी।

en.question: In a code: P$Q means P is father of Q. P#Q means P is mother of Q. P*Q means P is brother of Q. Which shows A is paternal grandmother of B?
en.explanation: Paternal grandmother = father's mother. A#C: A mother of C. C$B: C father of B. So A is C's mother, C is B's father. A is B's paternal grandmother.

hi.question: P$Q: P पिता Q का। P#Q: P माँ Q की। P*Q: P भाई Q का। A, B की दादी?
hi.explanation: A#C: A, C की माँ। C$B: C, B का पिता। A, B की दादी।

en.question: A and B are brothers. C is sister of A. D is brother of E. E is daughter of B. F is son of C. How is D related to F?
en.explanation: A,B brothers. C is their sister. D and E are B's children. F is C's child. D is B's son, F is C's son. D and F are cousins.

hi.question: A,B भाई। C,A की बहन। D,E का भाई। E,B की बेटी। F,C का बेटा। D,F से?
hi.explanation: D, B का बेटा। F, C का बेटा। D और F चचेरे भाई।

en.question: If X is brother of Y, Y is son of Z, Z is husband of W, how is W related to X?
en.explanation: Z is husband of W, so W is Z's wife. Y is son of Z, so Y is son of Z and W (assuming). X is Y's brother, so X is also son of Z and W. W is X's mother.

hi.question: X,Y का भाई। Y,Z का बेटा। Z,W का पति। W,X से?
hi.explanation: X,Y दोनों Z-W के बेटे। W,X की माँ।

en.question: Pointing to a photograph, a woman says: "This man's son's sister is my mother-in-law." How is woman's husband related to the man?
en.explanation: Man's son's sister = man's daughter = woman's mother-in-law. So the man is father of woman's mother-in-law. Woman's husband is son of her mother-in-law. So man is woman's husband's grandfather. Woman's husband is man's grandson.

hi.question: महिला: "इस आदमी के बेटे की बहन मेरी सास है।" महिला का पति, आदमी से?
hi.explanation: आदमी का बेटा, महिला की सास का भाई। आदमी, सास का पिता। पति, आदमी का पोता।

en.question: Sunita said: "He is my father's mother's only grandson." Who is he?
en.explanation: Father's mother = grandmother. Her only grandson = Sunita's brother (or Sunita herself if only grandchild, but 'he' indicates male). So he is Sunita's brother.

hi.question: सुनीता: "वह मेरे पिता की माँ का इकलौता पोता है।" वह कौन?
hi.explanation: पिता की माँ = दादी। इकलौता पोता = सुनीता का भाई।

en.question: A#B: A husband of B. A@B: A sister of B. A$B: A son of B. How is P related to Q in P$R@S#Q?
en.explanation: P$R: P son of R. R@S: R sister of S. S#Q: S husband of Q. So P is son of R. R is S's sister. S is Q's husband. So P is Q's nephew (husband's sister's son). No, P is R's son. R is S's sister. S is Q's husband. So P is Q's husband's nephew. That means P is Q's nephew by marriage. But simpler: P is son of R who is sister of S who is Q's husband. P is Q's nephew.

hi.question: A#B: A पति B का। A@B: A बहन B की। A$B: A पुत्र B का। P$R@S#Q में P,Q से?
hi.explanation: P,R का बेटा। R,S की बहन। S,Q का पति। P,Q का भतीजा (ननद का बेटा)।

en.question: Mohan is father of Sohan. Rohan is son of Mohan. Geeta is daughter of Sohan. How is Rohan related to Geeta?
en.explanation: Mohan has sons Sohan and Rohan. Geeta is Sohan's daughter. Rohan is Sohan's brother, so Rohan is Geeta's uncle.

hi.question: मोहन, सोहन का पिता। रोहन, मोहन का बेटा। गीता, सोहन की बेटी। रोहन, गीता से?
hi.explanation: रोहन, सोहन का भाई और गीता का चाचा।

en.question: A is brother of B. B is daughter of C. D is father of A. E is mother of B. How is D related to E?
en.explanation: A and B are siblings. C is their parent (mother/father). D is A's father. E is B's mother. So D and E are parents of A and B. D is E's husband.

hi.question: A,B का भाई। B,C की बेटी। D,A का पिता। E,B की माँ। D,E से?
hi.explanation: D और E, A-B के माता-पिता। D,E का पति।

en.question: Riya said: "This boy is son of my mother's only sister." How is boy related to Riya?
en.explanation: Mother's only sister = Riya's maternal aunt (mausi). Her son = Riya's cousin.

hi.question: रिया: "यह लड़का मेरी माँ की इकलौती बहन का बेटा है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: माँ की बहन = मौसी। उसका बेटा = रिया का चचेरा भाई।

en.question: A,B,C,D are 4 friends. A is father of B but B is not son of A. C is brother of A. D is daughter of C. How is B related to D?
en.explanation: A father of B but B is not son → B is daughter of A. C is A's brother. D is C's daughter. B is A's daughter, D is C's daughter. B and D are cousins.

hi.question: A,B,C,D मित्र। A,B का पिता पर B बेटा नहीं। C,A का भाई। D,C की बेटी। B,D से?
hi.explanation: B,A की बेटी। D,C की बेटी। A और C भाई। B और D चचेरी बहनें।

en.question: He said: "She is only daughter of my father's father." How is she related?
en.explanation: Father's father = grandfather. His only daughter = father's sister = paternal aunt (bua).

hi.question: उसने कहा: "वह मेरे पिता के पिता की इकलौती बेटी है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: पिता के पिता = दादा। उनकी इकलौती बेटी = बुआ।

en.question: A+B: A father of B. A*B: A mother of B. A-B: A wife of B. P+Q*R-S means P is ___ of S?
en.explanation: P+Q: P father of Q. Q*R: Q mother of R. R-S: R wife of S. So P is Q's father. Q is R's mother. R is S's wife. P is S's grandfather-in-law... Actually: P is father of Q. Q is mother of R. So P is R's grandfather (maternal). R is S's wife. So P is S's grandfather-in-law. But options closest: Grandfather.

hi.question: A+B: A पिता B का। A*B: A माँ B की। A-B: A पत्नी B की। P+Q*R-S में P,S का?
hi.explanation: P,Q का पिता। Q,R की माँ। P,R का नाना। R,S की पत्नी। P,S का नाना-ससुर।

en.question: Anil and Sunil are brothers. Anil's wife is Rita. Sunil's wife is Gita. How is Rita related to Gita?
en.explanation: Rita is Anil's wife. Gita is Sunil's wife. Anil and Sunil are brothers. So Rita and Gita are sisters-in-law (jethani-devrani).

hi.question: अनिल-सुनील भाई। अनिल की पत्नी रीता। सुनील की पत्नी गीता। रीता, गीता से?
hi.explanation: रीता और गीता, भाइयों की पत्नियाँ, अतः जेठानी-देवरानी।

en.question: Sita said: "He is son of my grandfather's only son." How is he related to Sita?
en.explanation: Grandfather's only son = Sita's father. His son = Sita's brother.

hi.question: सीता: "वह मेरे दादा के इकलौते बेटे का बेटा है।" संबंध?
hi.explanation: दादा का इकलौता बेटा = पिता। उसका बेटा = भाई।

en.question: If A+B means A is brother of B, A-B means sister, A×B means father, A÷B means mother, then P÷Q+R means?
en.explanation: P is mother of Q, Q is brother of R → P is mother of R

hi.question: यदि A+B = A, B का भाई है; A-B = बहन; A×B = पिता; A÷B = माता; तो P÷Q+R का अर्थ?
hi.explanation: P is mother of Q, Q is brother of R → P is mother of R

en.question: Gupta is the father of Amit's father. How is Gupta related to Amit?
en.explanation: Father's father = grandfather.

hi.question: Gupta, Amit के पिता के पिता हैं। Gupta का Amit से क्या संबंध है?
hi.explanation: पिता के पिता = दादा।

en.question: Introducing Priya, Geeta said, 'She/He is my son.' How is Priya related to Suresh?
en.explanation: Geeta is the mother. Suresh is the father. So Priya is their daughter.

hi.question: Geeta ने Priya का परिचय देते हुए कहा, 'यह मेरा/मेरी daughter है।' Priya का Suresh से क्या संबंध है?
hi.explanation: Geeta माता है और Suresh पिता है। इसलिए Priya उनका/की पुत्री है।

en.question: Introducing Ravi, Radha said, 'She/He is my daughter.' How is Ravi related to Mohan?
en.explanation: Radha is the mother. Mohan is the father. So Ravi is their son.

hi.question: Radha ने Ravi का परिचय देते हुए कहा, 'यह मेरा/मेरी daughter है।' Ravi का Mohan से क्या संबंध है?
hi.explanation: Radha माता है और Mohan पिता है। इसलिए Ravi उनका/की पुत्र है।

en.question: Rahul said, 'Rohit is my sister's brother.' How is Rohit related to Rahul?
en.explanation: My sister's sister is also my sister.

hi.question: Rahul ने कहा, 'Rohit मेरे sister का/की भाई है।' Rohit का Rahul से क्या संबंध है?
hi.explanation: मेरे sister का/की बहन भी मेरा/मेरी बहन ही है।

en.question: Introducing Kavita, Meena said, 'She/He is my daughter.' How is Kavita related to Rajesh?
en.explanation: Meena is the mother. Rajesh is the father. So Kavita is their daughter.
